design_philosophy.core_concept: A high-precision, low-latency tactical HUD for crypto snipers. Not a 'dashboard', but a 'cockpit'.

backgroundImage.grid-pattern: linear-gradient(to right, #1a1a1a 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #1a1a1a 1px, transparent 1px)

structure.header: h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-obsidian/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50

global_rules: Use 1px borders with low opacity for structure.
Buttons should be pill-shaped or strictly rectangular with cut corners.
Glassmorphism used only for overlays/sticky elements.

TokenCard.style: bg-charcoal/50 border border-white/5 hover:border-neon-green/30 transition-all duration-300 relative group overflow-hidden

elements.metric_row: grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2
elements.decoration: absolute -top-[1px] -right-[1px] w-2 h-2 bg-neon-green opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

FilterPanel.style: bg-surface border-r border-white/10 h-full p-6 hidden lg:block w-80 sticky top-16
FilterPanel.input_style: bg-black border border-white/10 focus:border-neon-green text-sm px-3 py-2 w-full font-mono text-white outline-none

StatusBadge.style: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono border border-current

visual_enhancers.corner_brackets: absolute w-2 h-2 border-t border-l border-neon-green/50 top-0 left-0

rules: Use framer-motion for list layout changes.

must_do: Use data-testid for all interactive elements
Ensure contrast ratios (Neon on Black is usually good, but check grays)
Add 'copy to clipboard' micro-interactions for contract addresses

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the tailwind.config.js with the colors and fonts provided.
3. Create a 'ScannerContext' to manage the 30s auto-refresh logic.
4. Build the 'TokenCard' component first as the primary atomic unit.
5. Use the abstract neon background image with an overlay of black/80 to ensure text readability.
6. Mock the DexScreener API response initially to perfect the UI before integrating real fetch.
7. Implement the 'FilterPanel' as a sidebar on desktop and a drawer on mobile.
